description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with elongated and stretched limbs and body parts. The head is relatively intact and human-like, but the torso, arms, and legs are unnaturally extended and twisted, creating a surreal, almost abstract form. The clothing appears to be a single-piece outfit, possibly resembling a suit or uniform, but is heavily warped along with the body. The figure's posture suggests a dynamic, crouched or lunging movement, with one leg bent and the other extended. The surface texture is smooth and matte, with visible folds and creases in the clothing. The overall appearance is more artistic or glitched than realistic, with exaggerated proportions and a lack of clear anatomical structure.
description: A distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a twisted, crouched posture, wearing a single-piece outfit. The head is intact, but the rest of the body is stretched and abstract.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with the right arm and leg stretched forward and downward in a dynamic pose.
description_view_1: The left side of the figure is more prominent, showing the elongated torso and the bent left leg, with the head facing forward.
description_view_2: The back of the figure is visible, highlighting the extended limbs and the warped, flowing lines of the clothing.
description_view_3: The lower body and legs are most visible, with the limbs appearing as long, ribbon-like forms curving around the space.
attribute_clothing_type: one-piece suit or uniform with long sleeves and pants
attribute_posture: crouched with limbs extended and twisted
